prediction.summary: A password spraying attempt was detected targeting 11 distinct standard user accounts via SSH. A single external IP address (203.0.113.45) made one failed password attempt against each account within a 30-second window before the connection was closed. No successful logins were observed, and no privileged accounts were targeted.

timeline.event: Failed password for user alice from 203.0.113.45

Failed password for user iris from 203.0.113.45

recommendations: Block the source IP address 203.0.113.45 at the network perimeter (firewall/security group).
Review SSH authentication logs for any successful logins from 203.0.113.45 or similar password spraying attempts from other external IPs.
Ensure strong password policies are enforced and multi-factor authentication (MFA) is enabled for all user accounts, especially those exposed via SSH.
Implement or verify rate-limiting mechanisms like fail2ban on SSH to mitigate brute force and password spraying attacks.
Monitor the targeted user accounts (alice, bob, carol, dave, eve, frank, grace, henry, iris, jack, kate) for any unusual login activity.
